glosses.vi: cửa sổ trưng bày; cửa kính trưng bày

sentences.target: Ich bleibe kurz am Schaufenster stehen.

translations.de: Ich bleibe kurz am Schaufenster stehen.
translations.en: I stop briefly at the shop window.
translations.es: Me detengo un momento frente al escaparate.
translations.fr: Je m’arrête un instant devant la vitrine.
translations.it: Mi fermo un attimo davanti alla vetrina.
translations.pt: Eu paro um instante diante da vitrine.
translations.he: אני עוצר לרגע ליד חלון הראווה.
translations.tr: Kısa bir süre vitrinin önünde duruyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi dừng lại một lát trước cửa sổ trưng bày.
translations.nl: Ik stop even bij de etalage.
translations.hi: मैं शोकेस के सामने थोड़ी देर रुकता हूँ.
translations.pl: Na chwilę zatrzymuję się przy witrynie.
translations.el: Σταματώ για λίγο μπροστά στη βιτρίνα.
translations.nb: Jeg stopper et øyeblikk ved utstillingsvinduet.
translations.id: Saya berhenti sebentar di depan etalase.
translations.sv: Jag stannar till en kort stund vid skyltfönstret.
translations.cs: Na chvíli se zastavím u výlohy.
translations.da: Jeg stopper et øjeblik ved udstillingsvinduet.
translations.ja: ショーウィンドーの前で少し立ち止まる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 1st person singular; main verb in a separable verb construction with 'stehen' forming 'stehenbleiben' (to stop/come to a halt).
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates short duration.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition marking location; governs dative.
Neuter noun; singular dative as object of the preposition 'an' (location).
Non-finite verbal component at clause end; together with 'bleibe' forms the separable verb 'stehenbleiben' meaning 'to stop/come to a halt'.

sentences.target: Sie fotografiert das Schaufenster mit den bunten Lichtern.
sentences.reading: /ziː fotoɡʁaˈfiːʁt das ˈʃaʊ̯fɛnstɐ mɪt deːn ˈbʊntən ˈlɪçtɐn/

translations.de: Sie fotografiert das Schaufenster mit den bunten Lichtern.
translations.ipa: /ziː fotoɡʁaˈfiːʁt das ˈʃaʊ̯fɛnstɐ mɪt deːn ˈbʊntən ˈlɪçtɐn/
translations.en: She takes a photo of the shop window with the colorful lights.
translations.es: Hace una foto del escaparate con las luces de colores.
translations.fr: Elle prend une photo de la vitrine avec les lumières colorées.
translations.it: Lei scatta una foto alla vetrina con le luci colorate.
translations.ko: 그녀는 알록달록한 불빛이 반짝이는 쇼윈도의 사진을 찍는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她给挂着彩灯的橱窗拍照。
translations.yue: 佢對住掛住彩燈嘅櫥窗影相。
translations.ru: Она фотографирует витрину с разноцветными огнями.
translations.pt: Ela tira uma foto da vitrine com as luzes coloridas.
translations.he: היא מצלמת את חלון הראווה עם האורות הצבעוניים.
translations.tr: Renkli ışıkları olan vitrinin fotoğrafını çekiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy chụp ảnh cửa sổ trưng bày với những ánh đèn nhiều màu.
translations.ar: تلتقط صورة لواجهة العرض بالأضواء الملوّنة.
translations.nl: Ze maakt een foto van de etalage met de kleurrijke lampjes.
translations.uk: Вона фотографує вітрину з різнокольоровими вогнями.
translations.hu: Lefotózza a színes fényekkel díszített kirakatot.
translations.hi: वह रंग-बिरंगी रोशनी वाले शोकेस की फोटो लेती है.
translations.pl: Ona robi zdjęcie witryny z kolorowymi światłami.
translations.el: Φωτογραφίζει τη βιτρίνα με τα πολύχρωμα φώτα.
translations.nb: Hun tar et bilde av utstillingsvinduet med de fargerike lysene.
translations.id: Dia memotret etalase dengan lampu warna-warni.
translations.sv: Hon tar ett foto av skyltfönstret med de färgglada ljusen.
translations.ro: Ea fotografiază vitrina cu luminile colorate.
translations.da: Hun tager et foto af udstillingsvinduet med de farverige lys.
translations.fi: Hän ottaa kuvan näyteikkunasta, jossa on värikkäät valot.
translations.ja: 彼女は色とりどりの明かりが飾られたショーウィンドーを写真に撮る。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; main verb.
Definite article; neuter singular accusative; marks the direct object.
Neuter noun; singular accusative; direct object of 'fotografiert'.
Preposition introducing an accompaniment/instrument PP; governs dative.
Definite article; dative plural; determiner for 'Lichtern'.
Attributive adjective; agrees with 'Lichtern' in case (dative) and number (plural).
Plural noun; dative plural; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns am Schaufenster vor dem Bäcker.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns am ˈʃaʊ̯fɛnstɐ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈbɛkɐ/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns am Schaufenster vor dem Bäcker.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns am ˈʃaʊ̯fɛnstɐ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈbɛkɐ/
translations.en: We’ll meet at the shop window in front of the bakery.
translations.es: Quedamos frente al escaparate de la panadería.
translations.fr: On se retrouve devant la vitrine de la boulangerie.
translations.it: Ci vediamo davanti alla vetrina del panificio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在面包店前的橱窗见面。
translations.yue: 我哋喺麵包店前面嘅櫥窗見面。
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar em frente à vitrine da padaria.
translations.he: ניפגש ליד חלון הראווה של המאפייה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau trước cửa sổ trưng bày của tiệm bánh.
translations.ar: سنلتقي عند واجهة العرض أمام المخبز.
translations.nl: We spreken af bij de etalage van de bakker.
translations.hi: हम बेकरी के सामने वाले शोकेस के पास मिलेंगे.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε μπροστά στη βιτρίνα του φούρνου.
translations.nb: Vi møtes ved utstillingsvinduet foran bakeriet.
translations.id: Kita akan bertemu di etalase di depan toko roti.
translations.sv: Vi ses vid skyltfönstret framför bageriet.
translations.ro: Ne întâlnim la vitrina din fața brutăriei.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se u výlohy před pekárnou.
translations.da: Vi mødes ved udstillingsvinduet foran bageren.
translations.ja: パン屋の前のショーウィンドーで会います。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, present 1st person plural; main verb.
Reflexive pronoun in accusative; marks reciprocal action with 'treffen'.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition marking location; governs dative.
Neuter noun; singular dative; object of 'an' (location).
Preposition marking spatial relation; governs dative.
Definite article; dative singular masculine; determiner for 'Bäcker'.
Masculine noun; singular dative; complement of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Er wischt das Schaufenster jeden Morgen gründlich.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ vɪʃt das ˈʃaʊ̯fɛnstɐ ˈjeːdən ˈmɔʁɡən ˈɡʁʏntlɪç/

translations.de: Er wischt das Schaufenster jeden Morgen gründlich.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ vɪʃt das ˈʃaʊ̯fɛnstɐ ˈjeːdən ˈmɔʁɡən ˈɡʁʏntlɪç/
translations.en: He wipes the shop window thoroughly every morning.
translations.es: Limpia a fondo el escaparate todas las mañanas.
translations.fr: Il essuie soigneusement la vitrine chaque matin.
translations.it: Pulisce accuratamente la vetrina ogni mattina.
translations.ko: 그는 매일 아침 쇼윈도를 구석구석 닦는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他每天早上都把橱窗擦得很干净。
translations.yue: 佢每日朝早都會將櫥窗抹得好乾淨。
translations.ru: Он каждое утро тщательно протирает витрину.
translations.pt: Ele limpa a vitrine a fundo todas as manhãs.
translations.he: הוא מנגב את חלון הראווה היטב כל בוקר.
translations.vi: Anh ấy lau kỹ cửa sổ trưng bày mỗi sáng.
translations.ar: يمسح واجهة العرض جيدًا كل صباح.
translations.nl: Hij maakt de etalage elke ochtend grondig schoon.
translations.hu: Minden reggel alaposan letörli a kirakatot.
translations.hi: वह हर सुबह शोकेस को अच्छी तरह पोंछता है.
translations.el: Κάθε πρωί σκουπίζει καλά τη βιτρίνα.
translations.nb: Han pusser utstillingsvinduet grundig hver morgen.
translations.id: Dia mengelap etalase itu setiap pagi hingga bersih.
translations.sv: Han torkar av skyltfönstret noggrant varje morgon.
translations.ro: El șterge bine vitrina în fiecare dimineață.
translations.da: Han tørrer udstillingsvinduet grundigt af hver morgen.
translations.fi: Hän pyyhkii näyteikkunan huolellisesti joka aamu.
translations.ja: 彼は毎朝ショーウィンドーを念入りに拭く。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; main verb.
Definite article; neuter singular accusative; determiner of the direct object.
Neuter noun; singular accusative; direct object of 'wischt'.
Determiner; masculine singular accusative; modifies 'Morgen' to form a temporal (accusative of time) adverbial.
Masculine noun; singular accusative; part of the temporal adverbial phrase 'jeden Morgen'.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb 'wischt'.
